title: Polarity sensing welding wire feeder system and method
abstract: A welding wire feeder includes a welding wire feed drive configured to drive welding wire towards a welding application, wire feed control circuitry coupled to and configured to control the welding wire feed drive. The welding wire feeder includes power conversion circuitry configured to receive polarized input power from a welding power source via input connections with defined polarities and to convert the polarized input power to welding output, sensing circuitry configured to detect the polarity of the polarized input power when connected to the input connections, and welding process control circuitry. The welding process control circuitry is coupled to the power conversion circuitry and the sensing circuitry. The welding process control circuitry is configured to provide the polarized input power to the power conversion circuitry only if the polarity of the polarized input power corresponds to the defined polarities of the input connections.
claims: 1. A welding wire feeder comprising: a welding wire feed drive configured to drive welding wire towards a welding workpiece; an input power connection configured to receive input power from a welding power source through a power cable coupled to the input power connection, the input power connection having a defined polarity; power conversion circuitry configured to receive the input power from the input power connection, the power conversion circuitry configured to convert the input power to welding output power for use by a welding torch; sensing circuitry comprising one or more sensors connected at the input power connection, the sensing circuitry configured to detect a polarity of the input power supplied to the input power connection; and control circuitry configured to provide the input power to the power conversion circuitry only when the polarity of the input power detected by the sensing circuitry corresponds to the defined polarity of the input power connection.
